batch_summary.note: Sep 2024: 1 primary RF-09 signal. S005 — reality denial via Olivia relay. Arc ACTIVE (5 signals).

primary_flags.message_text: ROW-7326: 'I don't know what you're talking about.' | ROW-7329: 'She said you're lying. She said she didn't say anything disrespectful at the dr' | ROW-7332: 'She said she didn't say anything disrespectful or sassy at the dr and you are just making it up'
primary_flags.summary: Sep 2024: Melissa deploys Olivia to deny Eli's account of a doctor's visit incident. Context: Eli reported that Olivia was disrespectful or sassy at the doctor's office. Melissa relays Olivia's counter-account as definitional truth: ROW-7326 'I don't know what you're talking about' (dismissal), ROW-7329 'She said you're lying. She said she didn't say anything disrespectful at the dr' — Olivia deployed as witness to deny Eli's reality, ROW-7332 'you are just making it up' — global credibility attack using Olivia's account as anchor. Evidence Level E: 'you're making it up' language attacks Eli's perception; the Olivia relay mechanism adds RF-08 compound dimension. Sev-1: no prior text record of the doctor's office incident to cross-reference (Level A not achievable). ADD-004: 'making it up' is the 4th documented instance of Melissa attacking Eli's perception of reality. Note: the RF-09+RF-08 compound here is the first instance of Olivia being used as a tool to deny Eli's account — distinct from RF-08 emotional/narrative relay (coaching Olivia's communications TO Eli) because this is deploying Olivia's account to DENY Eli's version of events.
